narrative.description: Soulslike games emphasize deliberate melee combat, stamina-managed offense, and high-stakes death penalties anchored by checkpoint bonfires. Level design rewards cautious exploration and pattern mastery.
narrative.core_loop: Explore hostile areas from a checkpoint hub, spend stamina on attacks and dodges, recover at bonfires, and defeat bosses to progress while managing risk of losing resources on death.

mechanics.map_notes: Attack, dodge, and block actions consume a shared stamina pool.
mechanics.expression: Attack, dodge, and block actions consume a shared stamina pool.

mechanics.map_notes: Weighty melee exchanges define most encounters.
mechanics.expression: Weighty melee exchanges define most encounters.

mechanics.map_notes: Bonfire-style checkpoints heal, respawn enemies, and save progress.
mechanics.expression: Bonfire-style checkpoints heal, respawn enemies, and save progress.

mechanics.map_notes: Limited healing between checkpoints raises stakes.
mechanics.expression: Limited healing between checkpoints raises stakes.

mechanics.map_notes: Enemy wind-ups must be read and punished or avoided.
mechanics.expression: Enemy wind-ups must be read and punished or avoided.

mechanics.map_notes: Bosses teach learnable attack patterns over repeated attempts.
mechanics.expression: Bosses teach learnable attack patterns over repeated attempts.

mechanics.map_notes: Late bosses shift patterns across health thresholds.
mechanics.expression: Late bosses shift patterns across health thresholds.

mechanics.map_notes: Stats and gear upgrades found through optional exploration.
mechanics.expression: Stats and gear upgrades found through optional exploration.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Soulslike through its core action rpg loop.
